items.content_html: When copying and pasting from .md files into Obsidian, multiple newlines are often created, making notes unnecessarily long. This Obsidan plugin removes points in a note where 3 or more newlines exist and reduces them to one. This is alpha and should be used with an abundance of caution. Ping me if interested.
items.title: WillLewis/obsidian-remove-empty-lines-plugin: When copying and pasting from .md files into Obsidian, multiple newlines are often created, making notes unnecessarily long. This Obsidan plugin removes points in a note where 3 or more newlines exist and reduces them to one. This is alpha and should be used with an abundance of caution.  Ping me if interested.
